title: Set Of 4 Natural Off White Pillar Candles 30 Hour Slim Wax Church Pillar Candle 12cm x 5cm
features: 4 x 30 Hour Natural Off White Colour Wax Church Pillar Candle
Create a warm and welcoming feel to your home with this white coloured plain wax pillar candle. Candles are a great way to create an inviting ambience to your indoor space for everyone to enjoy.
The use of pillar candles has always been popular because they burn beautifully with no soot or smoke. They also have a long burning time, for lengthy after-dinner conversations in the evenings.

This slim pillar candle measures approximately 12cm in height, 5cm in diameter and has a burn time of approximately 30 hours. The plain ivory colour will suit any colour scheme and can be used with a candle holder and mirror plate. Perfect for use all year round.
